response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software engineering experience with a strong track record in full-stack development, open-source contributions, and leadership in technical roles. However, his experience leans heavily toward web/mobile development and GIS systems, with limited evidence of deep AI, cloud infrastructure, or AI-powered product development at scale, which are core to the role. His entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) is promising but not directly aligned with AI strategy.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with 15+ years of experience and leadership roles (Staff/Principal Engineer)
Demonstrated ability to build and scale platforms (GISCollective, re:cinq) and contribute to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, developer tooling)
Entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective founder) showing product vision and technical execution
concerns: Limited direct experience in AI strategy, cloud platforms, or AI-powered product development at scale
Most recent roles focus on general software engineering rather than AI/cloud specialization
No advanced degree (MS/PhD) in AI-related field, though compensated by extensive practical experience
